title: Knockback Optimizer
description: Makes knockback physics render client side instantly
body:
**Knockback Optimizer**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow) [![Source](https://img.shields.io/badge/Source-181717?logo=github&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/cutebow/Anchor-Optimizer)
--- # How it works. Predicts knockback client-side so hits/explosions look instant instead of delayed by ping. Applies armor/shield/attributes (Blast Prot, Feather Falling, Knockback Resistance) to scale the predicted result closer to vanilla. Presets swap many settings at once: Extreme = most accurate/heaviest, Super Lite = fastest/least accurate. ---
**Showcase** __
--- Now the visuals aren't perfect but they certainly do look pretty close to what it should look like, I do plan on updating the mod to improve it and you can always tweak the settings to find whats perfect for you Is this allowed on servers? I don't know, it should be perfectly fine since it's just a visual client side mod and doesn't actually offer any advantages, Just make sure to check with the server before using it. and just dont test with it **Requires YACL and Mod Menu** have any questions? need help? want to report a bug? or you just wanna be cool? ⭐ **Then join my Discord!** [![Follow me!](https://img.shields.io/badge/Follow%20me!-💕-pink?style=flat)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow) [![NameMC](https://img.shields.io/badge/namemc-cutebow-ffb6c1?style=flat&logo=minecraft&logoColor=white)](https://namemc.com/profile/cutebow)
